items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 4 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「AI Innovators Adopt NVIDIA Vera — Why Max Single-Threaded CPU at Scale Matters」、「六个Agent 项目,五个半停留在试点:企业AI 落地到底卡在哪?」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: AI Innovators Adopt NVIDIA Vera — Why Max Single-Threaded CPU at Scale Matters
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：NVIDIA Vera exemplifies a new class of CPU, architected for the era of agents and being adopted by AI innovators including Perplexity; NVIDIA CPU roadmap continues with the NVIDIA Rosa CPU and its Rigel core.
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Intelligence is Free, Now What? Data Systems for, of, and by Agents
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：... government of the people, by the people, for the people ... — Abraham Lincoln, Gettysburg Address (1863) The cost of AI is dropping rapidly. GPT-4-class capabilities cost roughly $30 per million tokens in earl…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Choosing the Optimal Image Input Detail Level in LLMs — OpenRouter Blog
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：We ran 1,730 visual reasoning questions across 5 models. Dropping image detail to "low" costs real accuracy, and on gpt-5.5 the bill went up too. The lever that
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。
